productName: L.O.T Cars Flare 2.0 - RC Drift Car
productDec:
Meet Flare, the ultimate RC drift car crafted for those who demand performance and precision. Engineered with a leader’s spirit, Flare is bold, powerful, and unstoppable—setting a new benchmark in the world of RC drift cars.

With an impressive top speed of 20 km/h and a high-performance 4-wheel drive (4WD) system, Flare delivers exceptional control and stability on every surface. Whether you're mastering tight corners or executing smooth drifts, this remote control drift car ensures a seamless driving experience from start to finish.

Equipped with a 2.4GHz remote control, Flare offers a fast, responsive, and interference-free connection—giving you complete command with zero lag. It’s not just about driving; it’s about leading every move with confidence.

The eye-catching LED lights elevate every run, turning heads while lighting up your path. More than just a feature, they transform every drift session into a stunning visual performance.

If you're looking for a high-speed RC drift car, Flare is your perfect companion—powerful, stylish, and built to impress.

What’s Inside the Box
1 × RC Drift Car
1 × Remote Controller
1 × Type-C Battery Charger

Tyre Kit:

4 × High-grip tyres

Prop Kit:

8 × 18mm Cones
2 × Barrels

Battery Kit:

2 × AA Batteries
1 × Rechargeable 14500 500mAh 3.7V Battery
1 × Screwdriver

Bonus Items:

1 × License Card
1 × User Manual
1 × Comic Book

productName: L.O.T Cars Knox - Off-Road RC Truck
productDec:
Knox RC Off-Road Truck – Built for Extreme Terrain is designed for those who crave power, durability, and adventure in a high-performance RC off-road vehicle. With a bold attitude of no roads, no rules, no limits, Knox is not made for smooth surfaces but built to dominate dirt, gravel, and the toughest terrains with ease. Engineered with a powerful rear-wheel drive system, rugged construction, and deep-tread tyres, this remote control truck delivers superior grip, control, and unstoppable performance wherever you take it. Featuring three adjustable speed modes, Knox gives you complete control in every situation—start steady or unleash its full 25 km/h top speed for an adrenaline-filled ride. Equipped with bright front headlights and rear taillights, it’s ready for action day or night, ensuring the adventure never stops. Perfect for enthusiasts looking for a high-speed RC off-road truck, Knox is built to conquer every terrain.

In the box: 1 × RC Off-Road Truck, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Battery Charger, 2 × AA Batteries, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: L.O.T Cars Shadow - RC Drift Car
productDec:
Shadow RC Drift Car – Built to Dominate Every Drift is designed for true drift enthusiasts who demand precision, power, and performance. If you're looking for a high-performance RC drift car that naturally slides sideways with control and style, Shadow is your ultimate choice. Dark, aggressive, and engineered for serious drifting, this machine doesn’t just leave tyre marks—it makes a statement on every run. Powered by a full 4-wheel drive (4WD) system and reaching speeds of up to 20 km/h, Shadow delivers flawless control and smooth drifting performance every time. The advanced 2.4GHz remote control ensures fast, responsive, and interference-free driving, keeping you fully connected with every move. Equipped with striking LED lights, Shadow transforms every drift session into a visual spectacle, making sure all eyes are on you. Perfect for anyone seeking a high-speed RC drift car, Shadow lets you drift without limits and dominate every track.

In the box: 1 × RC Drift Car, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Battery Charger, tyre pouch with 4 × gripped tyres, prop kit including 8 × 18mm cones and 2 × barrels, battery kit with 2 × AA batteries, 1 × rechargeable 18650 1200mAh 3.7V battery and screwdriver, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: L.O.T Cars Ghost - RC Drift Car
productDec:
Ghost RC Drift Car – Speed You Can’t Catch is built for those who crave precision, style, and unstoppable performance in a high-speed RC drift car. Mysterious, fast, and incredibly smooth, Ghost isn’t just a remote control car—it’s an experience that glides effortlessly through every drift with unmatched control and presence. With a top speed of 20 km/h, a powerful 4-wheel drive (4WD) system, and responsive proportional throttle, Ghost delivers raw performance and precision handling on demand. The advanced 2.4GHz remote control ensures a fast, stable, and interference-free connection, keeping you fully in control at all times. Its striking LED lights create a unique, almost otherworldly glow, transforming every run into a stunning night-time spectacle that demands attention. Perfect for enthusiasts looking for a high-performance RC drift car, Ghost combines speed, control, and design to help you dominate every drift.

In the box: 1 × RC Drift Car, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Cable, tyre pouch with 4 × gripped tyres, prop kit with 4 × traffic cones, battery kit including 2 × AA batteries, 1 × rechargeable 14500 500mAh 3.7V battery and screwdriver, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: L.O.T Cars Otto - RC Auto 3 Wheeler
productDec:
Otto RC Street Car – Built for Speed, Chaos, and Pure Thrill is the ultimate RC car for those who crave adrenaline, power, and head-turning performance. Designed to dominate the streets, Otto delivers an electrifying driving experience that blends speed, precision, and attitude into one unstoppable machine. This high-performance remote control car roars to life with realistic engine sound effects and a dynamic exhaust smoke feature, creating an immersive, real-world racing feel with every run. Engineered for control as much as chaos, Otto features speed trim and steering alignment trim, ensuring razor-sharp handling through every drift, turn, and straight-line sprint. The deep-tread rear tyres provide superior traction for explosive acceleration and stable performance, while the ergonomic gun-style remote controller gives you precise, responsive control like a pro. Perfect for enthusiasts seeking a high-speed RC car with sound and smoke effects, Otto turns every drive into a full-scale street performance.

In the box: 1 × RC Car, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Battery Charger, 2 × AA Batteries, 1 × Screwdriver, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: L.O.T Cars Apex - 4x4 High Speed RC Car
productDec:
Apex 4x4 High-Speed RC Car – Built to Break Every Limit is engineered for enthusiasts who demand extreme performance, durability, and total control in a high-speed RC car. Designed for those who believe limits are meant to be pushed, Apex delivers an unmatched driving experience across all terrains. With a blazing top speed of 40 km/h, a powerful 4-wheel drive (4WD) system, high-grip tyres, a durable drivetrain, and responsive suspension, this RC car stays stable and in control even on the toughest surfaces. Featuring stepless speed control, Apex allows you to fine-tune your driving style—from smooth cruising to full-throttle action—while precision steering and metal shock absorbers ensure sharp handling and confident performance at every turn. Built for long-lasting adventures, it comes equipped with rechargeable batteries and a reliable 2.4GHz long-range remote control, keeping you connected and in command without interruption. Perfect for those seeking a high-speed 4x4 RC car, Apex is your ultimate gateway to adrenaline-filled, boundary-breaking RC action.

In the box: 1 × RC Car, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Battery Charger, 2 × AA Batteries, 1 × Rechargeable Battery, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: L.O.T Cars Dash - 1:64 Scale Mini RC Car
productDec:
Dash Mini RC Drift Car – Small Size, Massive Performance proves that great things truly come in compact packages. Designed as a 1:64 scale mini RC drift car, Dash delivers powerful performance, precise control, and thrilling drifting action in a small yet mighty form. Don’t let its size fool you—this compact remote control car packs impressive speed, reaching up to 10 km/h, along with proportional steering and dual-speed modes for smooth, responsive handling in every situation. Whether you're navigating tight spaces like desks and tabletops or pushing limits on the floor or track, Dash adapts effortlessly. Equipped with a reliable 2.4GHz remote control offering up to 100m range, it ensures a stable, interference-free connection wherever you drive. With functional lights and a sleek, detailed design, this mini RC car stands out in both performance and style. Perfect for enthusiasts looking for a high-performance mini RC drift car, Dash brings full-scale excitement in a pocket-sized machine.

In the box: 1 × Mini RC Drift Car, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × Type-C Battery Charger, kit including 3 × 30mm cones, 1 × screwdriver, 4 × gripped tyre sleeves, 2 × AAA batteries, plus bonus items including 1 × License Card, 1 × User Manual, and 1 × Comic Book.

productName: Traxxas TRX4m Defender 1:18 Scale Crawler Black
productDec:
TRX-4M All-Terrain RC Crawler – Compact Size, Extreme Capability is engineered for enthusiasts who demand unmatched performance, durability, and realism in a mini off-road RC truck. Built to conquer challenging terrains, the TRX-4M features grippy soft-compound tyres, a precision 4-link suspension system, and smooth oil-filled GTM™ shocks that keep all four wheels planted firmly on uneven surfaces for maximum control and stability. With an impressive 45° steering angle, it delivers an ultra-tight turning radius and exceptional maneuverability in confined spaces, powered by a heavy-duty waterproof 2065T steering servo. Designed for both performance and realism, the detailed ABS hard body with clipless mounting offers quick installation and a durable, high-gloss finish that resists wear and damage. Equipped with fully waterproof electronics, this RC crawler lets you drive through wet grass, puddles, and rough outdoor conditions without limits. Under the hood, a powerful Titan® 180 87T motor, shaft-driven 4WD system, steel ladder frame chassis, and electronic hill hold braking ensure reliable crawling performance across any terrain. Paired with the TQ™ 2.4GHz radio system, long-lasting 7.4V 750mAh LiPo battery, and fast USB charger, the TRX-4M delivers a complete ready-to-run experience for beginners and hobbyists alike.

Specifications: Length: 262 mm (Bronco) / 279 mm (Defender), Width: 124 mm front & rear track, Ground Clearance: 29 mm, Wheelbase: 155 mm, Height: 117 mm (Bronco) / 135 mm (Defender), Weight: approx. 468 g–483 g (without battery), Approach Angle: up to 54°, Breakover Angle: 45°, Departure Angle: up to 48°, Shock Length: 51 mm, Tire Size: 57 × 26 mm, Wheel Size: 26 × 13 mm, Drive System: Shaft-driven 4WD, Differential: Fully locked, Chassis: Steel ladder frame with nylon composite crossmembers.

What’s in the box: TRX-4M Ready-To-Race RC Truck, licensed ABS hard body, Titan® 180 87-turn motor, ECM-2.5 Electronic Control Module (ESC + receiver), TQ 2.4GHz transmitter, 7.4V 750mAh 2-cell LiPo battery, 2-amp USB fast charger with iD®, and high-quality maintenance tools.

productName: Traxxas 1:18 TRX4m Chevrolet K10 High Trail Limited Black Edition
productDec:
TRX-4M High Trail Edition RC Crawler – Elevated Performance, Unmatched Trail Dominance takes off-road capability to the next level with a factory-installed Long Arm Lift Kit that boosts ground clearance by over 35%, delivering a bold lifted stance and superior obstacle clearance. Engineered to maintain perfect suspension geometry, the extended links and revised shock mounts ensure smooth articulation and stability across challenging terrains. Equipped with larger 2.4″ Mickey Thompson® Baja Pro™ XS tyres, this high-performance RC crawler offers aggressive tread design and enhanced grip for maximum traction on dirt, rocks, and trails. The extended 162 mm wheelbase improves climbing stability and provides a smoother, more controlled ride over rough surfaces. Built with a durable steel ladder frame chassis, oil-filled shocks, and a powerful Titan® 180 87T motor, the TRX-4M High Trail Edition delivers consistent, reliable performance with a shaft-driven 4WD system and fully locked differentials. Its detailed clipless ABS body features molded color and chrome accents for a realistic scale appearance, while waterproof electronics allow you to tackle wet and rugged environments without limits. Paired with the TQ™ 2.4GHz radio system, ECM-2.5 control module, and a long-lasting 7.4V 750mAh LiPo battery, this ready-to-run RC truck is perfect for beginners and enthusiasts seeking a high-performance lifted RC crawler with real-world styling and trail-ready capability.

Specifications: Length: 269 mm, Width: 127 mm (front & rear track), Height: 127 mm, Ground Clearance: 40 mm, Wheelbase: 162 mm, Weight: 468 g (with battery), Approach Angle: 62°, Breakover Angle: 51.5°, Departure Angle: 52°, Shock Length: 51 mm, Tire Size: 62 × 26 mm, Wheel Size: 25 × 13 mm, Drive System: Shaft-driven 4WD, Differential: Fully locked (2:1 axle ratio), Chassis: Steel ladder frame with nylon composite crossmembers.

What’s in the box: TRX-4M High Trail Edition RC Truck, licensed ABS hard body, Titan® 180 87-turn motor, ECM-2.5 Electronic Control Module (ESC + receiver + lighting control), TQ 2.4GHz transmitter, 7.4V 750mAh 2-cell LiPo battery, 2-amp USB fast charger with iD®, and high-quality maintenance tools.

productName: FMS 1:24 FCX24M Land Rover Discovery Camel Trophy Edition RTR
productDec:
FMS 1/24 Land Rover Discovery Camel Trophy Edition RTR – Classic Adventure, Modern Performance brings the legendary spirit of off-road exploration to life in a compact, high-detail RC crawler. This officially licensed replica captures the iconic first-generation Land Rover Discovery in its signature Camel Trophy sand-yellow livery, delivering exceptional scale realism for both enthusiasts and collectors. Built on the advanced FCX24M chassis, it features a durable non-bearing trapezoidal metal beam, rugged ABS hard body, and a fully simulated interior for an authentic driving experience. Designed for versatility, the two-speed transmission allows smooth switching between crawling and off-road driving, while large-diameter tyres and solid ground clearance ensure confident performance across challenging terrains. A factory-installed roof rack enhances both the rugged look and functional appeal, making it a true expedition-ready model. Powered by a reliable 050 35T brushed motor and a 7.4V 380mAh LiPo battery, this RC crawler offers up to 20 minutes of runtime with a control range of up to 30 meters using the G3 V3 transmitter with R3A receiver. Perfect for those seeking a scale RC crawler with realistic detailing and off-road capability, this model combines heritage design with modern engineering for an immersive adventure experience.

Specifications: Length: 232 mm, Width: 105 mm, Height: 133 mm, Wheelbase: 134 mm, Tire Size: 48 × 17 mm, Ground Clearance: 28 mm, Approach Angle: 52°, Departure Angle: 55°, Motor: 050 35T brushed motor, Battery: 2S LiPo 7.4V 380mAh, Control Distance: up to 30 m, Runtime: approx. 20 minutes.

productName: FMS LC80 V2 1:18 Scale Grey RC Crawler
productDec: FMS 1:18 FCX18 Toyota Land Cruiser 80 V2 RTR RC Crawler – Legendary Design, Trail-Ready Performance brings the iconic off-road heritage of the Land Cruiser to life in a compact yet powerful RC crawler. Officially licensed by Toyota and now available in India, this model combines scale realism with serious off-road capability, making it perfect for enthusiasts and collectors alike. Built at 1:18 scale, it features a highly detailed body with a realistic interior, driver figurine, and functional roof rack that capture the rugged essence of the original Land Cruiser 80. Powered by a reliable 180 brushed motor and a smooth 2-speed gearbox, it delivers the perfect balance of torque for crawling and speed for trail driving. The advanced FCX18 chassis is equipped with metal portal axles, a four-link suspension system, and coil-spring oil-filled shocks, ensuring excellent articulation, stability, and ground clearance across rocks, mud, gravel, and steep inclines. Adding to the realism, the fully functional LED lighting system—including headlights, tail lamps, roof lights, and indicators—can be controlled directly from the transmitter. With 24 ball bearings and a durable drivetrain, this RC crawler offers smooth, reliable performance for long-lasting off-road adventures. Perfect for those seeking a high-performance scale RC crawler, the FCX18 Land Cruiser 80 V2 delivers both authenticity and capability in every drive.

MN-RC MN168 1:12 Scale RC Car – Realistic Design, Powerful Performance is built for enthusiasts who want a perfect blend of scale realism, durability, and high-performance driving. Designed in a detailed 1:12 scale, this RC car features a premium glossy finish, metal badges, and realistic elements like functional doors, real mirror-finish rearview mirrors, and nylon-built exterior parts for enhanced durability. Powered by a reliable 280 motor and a 7.4V 1200mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers smooth, responsive performance with a runtime of up to 30–40 minutes and a control range of up to 50 meters. The 17g waterproof steering servo ensures precise handling, while integrated headlights and linkage light system add to its realistic driving experience. Built with advanced safety features, it includes overcharge protection, overcurrent protection, low-voltage cutoff, and high-temperature protection, ensuring safe and long-lasting operation. With easy USB charging and a robust build weighing approximately 1.5 kg, the MN168 is perfect for those seeking a realistic RC car with strong performance and scale detailing. Available in yellow, blue, and dark blue, this model offers both style and substance for every RC enthusiast.

Specifications: Scale: 1:12, Dimensions: 38 × 17 × 17 cm, Battery: 7.4V 1200mAh, Motor: 280 motor, Charging Time: 120–180 minutes, Runtime: 30–40 minutes, Control Distance: up to 50 m, Weight: approx. 1.5 kg (with battery).

MNRC MN82S 1:12 Scale RC Pickup Truck – Retro Style, Off-Road Power is designed for enthusiasts of all ages who crave a perfect blend of rugged performance, realistic design, and precise control. Built with a tough ABS body and durable rubber tyres, this high-performance RC off-road pickup truck showcases a classic retro design while delivering modern capability on challenging terrains. Powered by a reliable 280 brushed motor and a robust 4WD drivetrain, the MN82S offers strong climbing ability, excellent traction, and stable performance both indoors and outdoors. Its advanced 2.4GHz full proportional control system ensures smooth, responsive steering and throttle control, giving you a realistic driving experience with zero interference. Fully ready-to-run (RTR), this RC truck comes pre-assembled, making it easy to start your adventure right out of the box. Perfect as a gift for kids, adults, and RC hobbyists, the MN82S combines durability, control, and off-road excitement in one versatile package.

Specifications: Model: MNRC MN82S, Scale: 1:12, Material: ABS plastic + rubber tyres, Motor: 280 brushed motor, Drive System: 4WD, Remote: 2.4GHz full proportional control, Functions: forward, backward, left/right steering, off-road climbing, Assembly: ready-to-run, Recommended Age: 8+ years.

MN-82 1:12 Toyota Land Cruiser LC79 RC Truck – Classic Design, Modern Off-Road Performance is a highly detailed and officially licensed replica built for enthusiasts who appreciate realism, durability, and trail-ready capability. Designed at a precise 1:12 scale, this 4WD RC rock crawler captures the rugged essence of the iconic Land Cruiser LC79, making it perfect for both driving and display. Equipped with an upgraded 280 motor and full proportional throttle and steering, it delivers smooth, responsive control for a realistic driving experience. The advanced leaf spring suspension system combined with a 17g waterproof steering servo ensures excellent stability and durability across rough terrains, while its impressive 46° climbing capability allows it to tackle steep inclines with ease. Featuring dual throttle rate settings, this RC truck lets you switch between controlled crawling and more dynamic driving based on your terrain. Built for performance and authenticity, the MN-82 is ideal for those seeking a highly realistic RC crawler with strong off-road capability, whether for adventure or collection.

MN300 4WD RC Tank Crawler – Built for Extreme Off-Road Adventures is a powerful and durable RC vehicle designed for enthusiasts who demand performance, stability, and long-lasting driving sessions. Engineered with a robust combination of nylon and metal components, this 4WD RC crawler delivers exceptional traction and climbing ability across challenging terrains like rocks, sand, grass, and uneven surfaces. Equipped with a responsive 2.4GHz anti-interference remote control system and full proportional steering and throttle, the MN300 ensures smooth, precise handling for a realistic driving experience. Its two-speed transmission system allows you to switch between controlled crawling and steady cruising, while the realistic lighting system—featuring front headlights, turn signals, and rear lights—adds an immersive visual touch. Powered by a 7.4V lithium battery, this crawler offers an impressive runtime of up to 60 minutes, making it perfect for extended outdoor sessions. With a control range of up to 50 meters and speeds reaching 7 km/h, the MN300 is ideal for hobbyists seeking a high-performance RC crawler with long battery life and rugged capability. Fully ready-to-run (RTR), it comes equipped with everything you need to start your adventure right out of the box.

Specifications: Model: MN-300, Colors: Orange / Silver, Material: Nylon + Metal, Speed: up to 7 km/h, Control Distance: up to 50 m, Battery: 7.4V lithium (included), Remote Battery: 2 × AA (not included), Runtime: up to 60 minutes, Charging Time: approx. 210 minutes, Recommended Age: 14+.

1593 Alloy RC Excavator 1:14 Scale – Heavy-Duty Construction Power with Realistic Control is a premium-grade RC construction vehicle designed for enthusiasts, collectors, and builders who demand realism, durability, and performance. Built with a मजबूत alloy metal arm and high-quality plastic body, this 1:14 scale RC excavator delivers an authentic construction experience with precise 22-channel control, allowing you to replicate real digging, lifting, and loading actions with accuracy. Powered by a reliable 7.4V 1200mAh lithium battery, it offers up to 60 minutes of runtime, making it perfect for extended play or display sessions. The advanced 2.4GHz remote control system ensures stable, interference-free operation with a control range of up to 30 meters, while the responsive controls provide smooth and realistic movement in every function. Designed in a detailed Huina-style build, this excavator features a robust structure weighing approximately 4.6 kg, giving it a solid, heavy-duty feel. With USB charging convenience and a ready-to-run setup, it’s ideal for anyone looking for a high-performance RC excavator with realistic functions and long battery life. Perfect for ages 14+ and above, this model combines engineering precision with immersive construction play.

Specifications: Brand: JIKEFUN (Huina-style series), Model: 1593, Scale: 1:14, Material: Alloy + high-quality plastic, Control Channels: 22, Frequency: 2.4GHz, Control Distance: approx. 30 m, Runtime: up to 60 minutes, Charging Time: approx. 240 minutes, Battery: 7.4V 1200mAh lithium (included), Remote Battery: 3 × AA (not included), Dimensions: 56 × 34.2 × 19 cm, Box Size: 59 × 25 × 34 cm, Weight: approx. 4.6 kg.

HB-R1604 / R1606 1:16 Scale 4WD RC Off-Road Jeep – Built for Real Terrain Performance sets a new standard for enthusiasts seeking a realistic and durable RC Jeep Wrangler-style crawler. Unlike ordinary plastic RC cars, this high-quality 1:16 scale simulation vehicle is engineered to replicate the rugged capability of a real off-road machine, delivering superior stability, traction, and control. From the moment you handle it, the solid, heavy-duty chassis reflects its premium build, designed to withstand rough terrain while maintaining balance and grip. Equipped with an advanced 4WD drivetrain, this RC off-road vehicle distributes power efficiently to all wheels, allowing it to climb steep inclines, tackle rocky paths, and navigate uneven surfaces with ease. Its precision-engineered suspension system offers excellent wheel articulation and shock absorption, ensuring maximum ground contact even in challenging conditions like deep ruts and obstacles. More than just a toy, the HB-R1604/R1606 behaves like a true simulation RC crawler, delivering realistic movement, smooth handling, and consistent performance across demanding terrains. Perfect for enthusiasts searching for a high-performance 4WD RC Jeep, this model combines durability, realism, and off-road capability to dominate every adventure.

High-Performance 4WD RC Car – Durable Build, Precision Control, and Long-Range Performance is designed for enthusiasts who demand reliability, power, and advanced features in a modern remote control vehicle. Built with a  metal chassis beam construction and equipped with a metal gear steering servo, this RC car delivers exceptional durability and precise handling across various terrains. The advanced four-wheel drive (4WD) system ensures superior traction and stability, while the front and rear independent suspension provides smooth performance even on rough surfaces. Featuring high-precision imported bearings throughout the vehicle, it offers efficient, low-friction movement for enhanced speed and control. With a powerful lithium battery, this RC car delivers up to 30 minutes of runtime and a control range of up to 100 meters, making it perfect for extended outdoor driving. The integrated LED front and rear lights along with stylish colorful roof lights add a striking visual appeal, especially during night runs. Additional features like cruise control functionality and steering trim adjustment ensure a customizable and smooth driving experience. Fully ready-to-run (RTR) and CE certified, this RC car supports forward, reverse, and precise steering controls, making it ideal for both beginners and experienced users looking for a high-performance RC car with long battery life and advanced features.

In the box: 1 × RC Car, 1 × 7.4V Battery, 1 × Remote Controller, 1 × USB Charging Cable, and 1 × Instruction Manual.

HB-R1001 Bronco 1:10 Scale RC Car – Realistic Design Meets Off-Road Power is built for enthusiasts who want a perfect combination of scale realism and high-performance off-road capability. Designed to replicate the iconic Bronco, this 1:10 scale RC car features a detailed hard-body shell with authentic decals, LED headlights and taillights, and a high ground clearance chassis built for rugged terrains. Powered by a strong brushed motor (with upgrade potential to brushless), a durable metal gear transmission, and a capable 4WD drivetrain, it delivers smooth power, excellent traction, and reliable climbing performance on rocks, dirt, and trails. The advanced independent suspension system with oil-filled shocks ensures stability and control across uneven surfaces, while deep-tread all-terrain tyres provide maximum grip in any condition. Fully ready-to-run (RTR), the HB-R1001 comes pre-assembled with a responsive 2.4GHz remote control, rechargeable battery, and USB charger, allowing you to start driving right out of the box. Built with waterproof electronics, including a splash-resistant ESC, servo, and receiver, this RC car is ready to handle mud, water, and all-weather adventures. Perfect for those seeking a high-performance 4WD RC off-road car with realistic design, the HB-R1001 Bronco delivers durability, control, and excitement in every drive.

HB Toys ZP1005 1:10 Scale 4WD RC Off-Road Car – High-Speed Power Meets Rugged Performance is built for enthusiasts who want speed, durability, and precise control in a full-size RC experience. Designed in a true 1:10 scale, this high-performance RC off-road car features a strong 4WD drivetrain that delivers excellent traction and stability across dirt, gravel, grass, and sand. Powered by a high-performance 550 brushed motor and supported by an integrated ESC/receiver system, the ZP1005 reaches impressive speeds of up to 40–45 km/h, offering an adrenaline-filled driving experience. Its durable ABS chassis with metal components, combined with independent suspension and oil-filled shock absorbers, ensures smooth handling and impact resistance on rough terrains. Equipped with high-grip off-road tyres and a responsive high-torque steering servo, it provides precise, proportional throttle and steering control through a reliable 2.4GHz anti-interference transmitter with a range of up to 80–100 meters. The included 7.4V 1500mAh Li-ion battery delivers up to 15–20 minutes of runtime, with convenient USB charging and a quick battery swap system for extended play. Featuring splash-resistant electronics and a lightweight yet durable build, the ZP1005 is perfect for those seeking a high-speed 4WD RC car with strong off-road capability and realistic driving performance.

HB Toys ZP1006 1:10 Scale 4WD RC Climbing Truck – Rugged Power for Every Terrain is built for enthusiasts who want durability, control, and off-road performance in a high-quality RC truck. Designed with an aggressive desert truck styling and a large 1:10 scale body, this RC vehicle is ready to tackle dirt, rocks, grass, and gravel with ease. Powered by a strong 540 brushed motor and a full-time 4WD drivetrain, the ZP1010 delivers excellent torque, traction, and stability for climbing and rough-terrain driving. Its advanced independent suspension system with hydraulic shock absorbers ensures smooth handling and control across uneven surfaces, while the metal transmission system adds durability for long-term use. Equipped with soft vacuum rubber tyres, it provides superior grip and stability on all terrains. The responsive 2.4GHz remote control offers precise handling with a control range of up to 50 meters, while the included 7.4V 1500mAh Li-ion battery delivers speeds of up to 15 km/h and a runtime of approximately 8–20 minutes. With convenient USB charging and a robust build, this RC truck is perfect for those seeking a high-performance 4WD RC climbing truck with realistic design and strong off-road capability.

HB Toys ZP1009 1:10 Scale RC Off-Road Truck – Durable Performance for Every Terrain is designed for enthusiasts who want a reliable, rugged, and high-performance RC truck for outdoor adventures. Built in a realistic 1:10 scale, this off-road machine features a tough plastic body with metal transmission components, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance on rough terrains like rocks, grass, and gravel. Powered by a strong 540 brushed motor and a 7.4V 1500mAh Li-ion battery, the ZP1009 delivers speeds of up to 15 km/h with smooth and controlled acceleration. Its advanced independent 4-wheel suspension system with hydraulic shock absorbers provides excellent stability and impact absorption, while soft vacuum rubber tyres ensure superior grip across multiple surfaces. The responsive 2.4GHz remote control system offers interference-free operation with a range of up to 50 meters, making it ideal for uninterrupted driving sessions. With convenient USB charging and a runtime of up to 20 minutes, this RC truck is perfect for both beginners and hobbyists looking for a high-performance 4WD-style RC off-road truck with realistic handling and durability.

High-Performance 4WD RC Off-Road Car – Advanced Control, Rugged Build, and Long-Range Power is engineered for enthusiasts who demand precision, durability, and next-level features in a modern RC vehicle. Equipped with a responsive 2.4GHz full proportional steering system, this RC car delivers smooth and accurate control with a long remote range of up to 100 meters. Powered by a reliable lithium battery, it offers over 30 minutes of runtime after approximately 4 hours of charging, reaching speeds of up to 18 km/h for an exciting driving experience. The robust four-wheel drive (4WD) system, combined with front and rear independent suspension, ensures superior stability and traction across rough terrains. Built with high-grip TPR rubber tyres and an IPX4 splash-proof design, it performs confidently on dirt, gravel, and wet surfaces. Enhanced with LED lighting, breathing light effects, and a stylish black interior finish, it stands out both in performance and appearance. Advanced features like fast/slow speed modes, a remote-controlled electric winch, and optional front and rear electronically controlled differential locks provide added versatility and control for serious off-road adventures. Supporting both 2S and 3S lithium batteries, this CE-certified RC car is perfect for those seeking a feature-rich, long-range 4WD RC off-road vehicle built for performance and reliability.

HB Toys R1011 1:10 Scale 4WD RC Off-Road Car – Advanced Technology Meets Rugged Performance is a next-generation upgrade designed for enthusiasts who demand realism, durability, and full control on any terrain. Built as a significant evolution over earlier models, the R1011 introduces front and rear electronically controlled differential locks, allowing superior traction and precision while tackling rocks, mud, and uneven surfaces. Powered by a strong 550 brushed motor and supported by a robust 4WD drivetrain with independent suspension, it delivers stable, smooth, and reliable off-road performance. The newly engineered chassis with alloy gears enhances durability, while the advanced 4-servo control system—handling steering, gear shifting, and both differential locks—offers unmatched driving realism and control. Designed for versatility, it features dual speed modes for both slow crawling and faster driving, along with compatibility for 2S and 3S Li-ion batteries. With a runtime of up to 30 minutes and a control range of approximately 100 meters via a responsive 2.4GHz system, this RC car is built for extended adventures. The aggressive styling is enhanced with breathing lights and Demon Eye angel flow lighting, making it stand out even during night runs. Built with durable ABS, nylon, and alloy materials, along with an IPX4 splashproof design and high-grip TPR rubber tyres, the R1011 is perfect for those seeking a feature-packed, high-performance 4WD RC off-road car with advanced control and realistic driving dynamics.

MJX Hyper Go 14303 1:14 Scale Brushless RC Car – High-Speed Performance, Precision Control is built for beginners and seasoned racers who demand speed, durability, and total control on any terrain. Designed for both off-road adventures and competitive racing, this high-performance RC car reaches an impressive top speed of up to 42 km/h, powered by a powerful 2845 3900KV brushless motor paired with a 45A brushless ESC featuring a metal heat sink for efficient cooling. Its advanced setup includes an aluminum heat sink with cooling fan, a responsive 17g digital servo, and a reliable 2.4GHz remote control system offering a long control range of up to 120 meters for precise, interference-free driving. Built for stability and handling, the 14303 features a well-balanced chassis, durable construction, and interchangeable TPR off-road tyres and slick tyres for versatile performance across surfaces. Equipped with a 7.4V 2000mAh 2S LiPo battery, it delivers up to 13 minutes of high-speed runtime, making every session fast, intense, and exciting. Compact yet powerful, with a size of 320 × 153 × 115 mm, this RC car is perfect for those seeking a high-speed brushless RC car with racing performance and off-road capability.

MJX Hyper Go 14304 1:14 Scale Brushless RC Drift Car – Ultimate Speed, Precision & Customization is engineered for enthusiasts who demand extreme performance, tunability, and versatility in a high-speed RC car. Designed with fully adjustable independent suspension, customizable shock positions, adjustable camber, and chassis clearance, this model offers a true hobby-grade experience with upgradeable alloy components for enhanced durability. Powered by a high-performance 2852 brushless motor and a 45A waterproof ESC, the 14304 delivers blistering speeds of up to 67 km/h with a 3S battery (optional) or 45 km/h with the included 2S 7.4V 2000mAh battery, ensuring thrilling performance on any surface. The advanced 4WD drivetrain with metal differentials and drive shafts provides superior traction and control, while oil-filled aluminium capped shocks ensure smooth handling at high speeds. Equipped with a responsive 17g digital servo, 2.4GHz radio system with up to 120m range, and full proportional control, it offers precise, interference-free driving. This versatile RC car includes three complete wheel sets—drift, on-road, and rally—allowing you to switch driving styles effortlessly. With LED lights controlled via the transmitter, water-resistant electronics, anti-skid high-grip tyres, and a durable crack-resistant body shell, the MJX 14304 is perfect for those seeking a high-speed brushless RC drift car with pro-level customization and multi-terrain capability.

MJX Hyper Go 14211 1:14 Scale Brushless RC Truck – Extreme Speed, Metal Build, Race-Ready Power is engineered for enthusiasts who demand top-tier performance, durability, and precision in a high-speed RC machine. Powered by a high-performance 2852 brushless motor paired with a 45A ESC supporting both 2S and 3S LiPo batteries, this RC truck delivers thrilling speeds of up to 49 km/h on 2S and an incredible 70 km/h on 3S, making it one of the fastest in its class. Built for strength and reliability, it features a full metal chassis with CNC aluminum steering components, metal differential gears, and telescopic metal dogbones, ensuring efficient power transfer and durability under extreme conditions. The advanced 69mm oil-filled adjustable shocks provide long-travel suspension for superior off-road stability and control, while full ball bearings enhance smooth performance. Equipped with a 2.4GHz T3D transmitter with built-in gyro stabilization, it offers precise handling, improved cornering, and a control range of up to 120 meters. The rugged polycarbonate body shell with detailed interior adds realism and impact resistance, while the included extra set of spare tyres with white rims allows easy customization and extended usage. Complete with a 2S 3000mAh LiPo battery, USB charger, and ready-to-run setup, the MJX 14211 is perfect for those seeking a high-speed brushless 4WD RC truck with premium metal construction and racing performance.

MJX Hyper Go 18208 1:18 Scale RC Car – Compact Power, Smooth Control, and All-Terrain Fun is designed for enthusiasts who want a balance of speed, durability, and precision in a compact RC vehicle. Built at a versatile 1:18 scale, this high-performance RC car is powered by a reliable 380 brushed motor paired with an integrated ESC/receiver unit, delivering smooth and responsive driving with full proportional control. With a top speed of up to 30 km/h, it offers an exciting driving experience while maintaining stability across various terrains. Equipped with a 17g digital servo and a 2.4GHz remote control system, it ensures precise handling and a stable, interference-free connection with a control range of 60–80 meters. The package includes two 7.4V 1500mAh Li-ion batteries, providing extended playtime with approximately 10 minutes per battery, making it ideal for longer sessions. Designed with a durable build and optimized dimensions for agility, the 18208 delivers excellent balance and control whether you're racing or exploring. Perfect for those seeking a compact high-speed RC car with reliable performance and smooth handling, the MJX Hyper Go 18208 is a great choice for both beginners and hobbyists.

1:7 Scale 4WD Rally Drift RC Car – Volkswagen Polo R WRC Inspired, Extreme Power & Precision is a large-scale, high-performance RC machine built for enthusiasts who demand professional-grade speed, control, and durability. Designed in a striking Volkswagen Polo R WRC style, this powerful 1:7 scale RC car is equipped with a 3974 sensored brushless motor (approx. 2500KV) that delivers smooth, consistent power, paired with a robust 120A ESC featuring an independent heatsink and cooling fan for efficient thermal management during high-speed runs. Built for precision handling, it includes a 35kg high-torque metal servo, ensuring sharp and responsive steering even at extreme speeds. The advanced 4WD drivetrain with full metal components—including driveshafts, CVD shafts, and differentials—provides exceptional durability and reliable power transfer, while the independent front and rear suspension with oil-filled shocks ensures stability and control across rally tracks, drift surfaces, and rough terrain. With speeds of up to 60 km/h on a 4S LiPo setup, a control range of up to 120 meters, and a massive presence at 632 mm in length, this RC car delivers a true large-scale racing experience. Perfect for those seeking a premium high-speed rally/drift RC car with metal construction and pro-level performance, this model is built to dominate both track and terrain.

MJX Hyper Go 7303 WRC C3 1:7 Scale Brushless RC Rally Car – Pro-Level Speed, Precision & Realism is engineered for serious enthusiasts who demand professional performance, large-scale presence, and true rally dynamics. Inspired by the iconic Citroën WRC C3, this 1:7 scale RC rally car combines scale realism with advanced engineering, featuring a powerful 3974–2500KV sensored brushless motor paired with an independent 120A ESC for smooth acceleration, efficient power delivery, and consistent high-speed performance. When equipped with a 4S LiPo battery, the 7303 reaches thrilling speeds of up to 60 km/h, making it ideal for both on-road racing and off-road rally conditions. Built for control and stability, it features a 35kg high-torque digital servo for precise steering and a full-time 4WD system with front, centre, and rear differentials, ensuring balanced traction across gravel, tarmac, and loose terrain. The large-scale chassis enhances stability and handling, while the durable construction with aluminium heat-sink cooling and reinforced body design ensures reliability under demanding conditions. Equipped with a responsive 2.4GHz 3-channel remote system offering up to 120 meters range, along with full proportional control, the 7303 delivers smooth throttle response and accurate cornering at any speed. Perfect for hobbyists seeking a premium large-scale brushless RC rally car with professional-grade performance, the MJX Hyper Go 7303 WRC C3 is built to dominate tracks and terrains alike.

JJRC C8815 RC Jeep – Ultra-Realistic Scale Crawler with Functional Details & Adventure-Ready Design is crafted for enthusiasts who value realism, detail, and immersive off-road experience over raw speed. Designed in a rugged Jeep-style scale model, this RC car features fully functional LED headlights, tail lights, turn signals, and an independently controlled spotlight, giving you complete lighting control for day or night adventures. What sets the C8815 apart is its working steering wheel mechanism, where turning the wheel inside the cabin directly moves the front wheels—delivering a truly lifelike driving experience. Built for both play and display, it showcases incredible detailing including an adjustable windshield, realistic undercarriage, opening hood, and customizable interior with swappable dashboard and seats. The model also includes adventure-ready accessories like a removable shovel, axe, fuel tank, and rear-mounted spare tyre, with upgrade options for a winch and canopy for added realism. Powered by a reliable 280 brushed motor and a 7.4V 500mAh Li-ion battery, it offers a runtime of up to 40 minutes with a control range of approximately 50 meters via a responsive 2.4GHz 4-channel remote system. With a top speed of 6 km/h, it prioritizes control and realism, making it perfect for collectors and hobbyists seeking a highly detailed RC crawler for display and light off-road fun.

JJRC C8815 Willys Military Jeep 1:12 Scale 4WD RC Truck – Classic Design, Modern Off-Road Performance brings the spirit of adventure and history together in a highly detailed, ready-to-run RC vehicle. Inspired by the legendary WWII Willys Jeep, this 1:12 scale RC truck delivers authentic military styling with precise detailing, including realistic body lines, front grille, and scale wheels—making it perfect for both display and action. Built for performance, the C8815 features a capable 4WD drivetrain that provides excellent traction and stability, allowing it to conquer sand, dirt, grass, and rocky terrain with confidence. Its high-grip rubber tyres and advanced suspension system ensure smooth handling and shock absorption, even on uneven surfaces. Constructed with durable impact-resistant ABS materials, this RC jeep is designed to withstand rugged outdoor use while maintaining its realistic look. Equipped with functional LED headlights, it enhances both visual appeal and usability during low-light driving. Powered by a 7.4V rechargeable Li-ion battery, it offers up to 20–30 minutes of runtime, while the responsive 2.4GHz pistol-grip remote control provides stable, interference-free operation with a range of up to 80–100 meters, allowing multiple vehicles to run simultaneously. Ideal for collectors, hobbyists, and outdoor explorers, the JJRC C8815 is a perfect choice for those seeking a realistic military RC jeep with reliable 4WD off-road capability.

JJRC C8815 RC Jeep – Ultra-Realistic 1:12 Scale Military Crawler with Functional Details is designed for enthusiasts who appreciate authenticity, craftsmanship, and immersive off-road experiences. This highly detailed RC jeep comes equipped with fully functional LED headlights, tail lights, turn signals, and an independently controlled spotlight, giving you complete command over its lighting system for both day and night adventures. What truly sets it apart is its working steering wheel mechanism, where turning the wheel inside the cabin directly controls the front wheels—delivering a lifelike driving experience rarely seen in RC models. Built for both display and action, it features a realistic undercarriage, adjustable windshield, opening hood, and customizable interior components, allowing you to swap elements like the dashboard and seats. The design is further enhanced with scale accessories including a removable shovel, axe, fuel tank, and rear-mounted spare tyre, while also offering upgrade options for a winch and canopy to elevate realism even further. Powered by a reliable 280 brushed motor and a 7.4V 500mAh Li-ion battery, it delivers up to 40 minutes of runtime with smooth proportional control via a 2.4GHz 4-channel remote system and a control range of approximately 50 meters. With a top speed of 6 km/h, this model focuses on control, realism, and detail, making it perfect for collectors and hobbyists looking for a lifelike RC crawler for display and light off-road exploration.

WLTOYS 104020 1:10 Scale 4WD RC Rock Crawler – Extreme Climbing Power, Long Runtime & Rugged Durability is built for enthusiasts who demand realistic crawling performance, strength, and control across the toughest terrains. Equipped with a powerful 550 motor and a high-capacity 7.4V 3000mAh 18650 lithium battery, this RC crawler delivers up to 45 minutes of runtime, making it ideal for extended off-road sessions. Designed with a durable combination of nylon, ABS, and metal components, it ensures long-lasting performance even under demanding conditions. The advanced front and rear four-link suspension system enhances articulation and stability, while the portal axle design increases ground clearance to 80 mm, allowing it to easily tackle rocks, mud, and uneven trails. Built for precision and smooth operation, it features full ball bearings and alloy gear differentials, ensuring efficient power delivery and consistent crawling performance. The responsive 2.4GHz remote control system offers a control range of up to 100 meters, with functions including forward, reverse, steering, braking, and high/low speed modes for realistic driving control. Enhanced with vivid LED lighting, high-grip rubber tyres, and optional upgrade support for a remote electric winch, this crawler is as capable as it is visually striking. With a max speed of 11 km/h (high) and 3 km/h (low), the WLTOYS 104020 is perfect for those seeking a high-performance RC rock crawler with long runtime, superior suspension, and true off-road capability.

Mini RC Car 1:76–1:64 Scale – Ultra-Compact, High-Speed, Fully Customizable Micro RC Experience is designed for enthusiasts who want powerful performance in a pocket-sized package. Built on the advanced TC04 chassis, this next-generation mini RC car offers faster response, improved stability, and smoother handling compared to previous models. Despite its tiny size—as small as your thumb—it delivers impressive performance with a high-speed motor reaching up to 51,000 RPM, offering a 50% power boost over standard models. The adjustable wheelbase (38.8–41.2mm) allows compatibility across 1:76 to 1:64 scale, giving you flexibility for DIY customization. Equipped with a 75mAh high-performance lithium battery with a convenient plug-in design, it ensures quick swaps and continuous fun. This micro RC car features full proportional control, enabling precise steering and driving even in tight indoor spaces. Realism is enhanced with simulated LED headlights, turn signals with steering linkage, brake lights, and emergency flashers, all integrated seamlessly into its compact design. The package also includes two removable DIY car shells, allowing you to personalize your build and create your own unique mini RC car. Perfect for tabletop racing, display, or on-the-go fun, the C75 delivers a high-performance micro RC car experience with customization, realism, and portability.
